summary: Real-shell test creates all missing components on a real filesystem (is_dir + 0700 asserted, not stubbed - only the orthogonal setup_pi_auth is faked), and a rerun rejects already-exists failures via identical output + is_dir; success is enforced by the line-count guard on '|| echo unsupported'. Untested soft edge: partial pre-existence (credential root exists, outfitter/profiles missing).
